content: Just as function calling lets autonomous agents select and invoke external tools to complete real-world tasks, we can frame an agent's memory operations as a specialized tool set that the LLM orchestrates to retrieve, update, or prune context based on current task demands, rather than baking fixed memory management logic into the agent architecture. This creates a curiosity-aligned memory system where the agent can proactively call a memory exploration tool to seek out missing context that reduces uncertainty about future actions.
source_topics: tool use function calling autonomous agent
trigger_topic: tool use function calling autonomous agent
